pages.title: Jayodeed - Going Crazy (Rooklyn Mix)
pages.tagline: Dive into a chaotic G-major obsession.

pages.body: Step onto the floor of 'Going Crazy (Rooklyn Mix),' where pulsating basslines collide with atmospheric keys to create an urgent, club-ready atmosphere. This driving synth-pop track captures the raw vulnerability of turbulent romantic addiction, oscillating between screaming desire and cold resignation. As the tempo rockets past 140 beats per minute, confessional vocals weave a narrative of toxic love that blurs into dependency. You will feel the immediate onset of madness triggered by mere presence, followed by the disorienting haze where alcohol masks deep pain. The journey builds from nervous anticipation to pure sonic chaos before settling into the melancholic logic of a broken cycle, leaving you with an echo of obsession that refuses to fade completely.
pages.styleSentence: A driving G major synth-pop track at a high-energy 143.5 bpm featuring pulsating basslines and atmospheric keys that build an urgent, club-ready vibe perfect for expressing turbulent romantic obsession.

pages.vocalStyle: Confessional and breathy with dynamic intensity

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Whispers confessions until they scream desire loud.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers harmonies that deepen the chaotic obsession.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Kicks a frantic heartbeat through every violent downbeat.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Pulsates deep rhythms to drive the urgent groove forward.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Weaves atmospheric textures into an electric, anxious dreamscape.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Sprinkles dusty echoes over the glossy dance-floor sheen.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Paints melancholic pads that swell with emotional intensity.

levels.name: ANTICIPATION STORM
levels.emotion: Anticipation and nervous energy building a storm.

levels.name: MADNESS ONSET
levels.emotion: Conflicted urgency; the immediate onset of madness triggered by presence.

levels.name: SCREAMING DESIRE
levels.emotion: Peak chaotic intensity; screaming desire amidst destruction.

levels.name: HAZE OF PAIN
levels.emotion: Disoriented vulnerability; the haze of alcohol masking pain.

levels.name: RISING TENSION WAVES
levels.emotion: Rising tension and rhythmic oscillation like crashing waves.

levels.name: COLD LOGIC CYCLE
levels.emotion: Melancholic resignation and the cold logic of a broken cycle.

levels.name: SONIC CHAOS NOISE
levels.emotion: Pure sonic chaos; disintegration of self into noise.

levels.name: FAADING ECHO LOOP
levels.emotion: Fading echo of obsession refusing to let go completely.
